mark_scheme.accept_en: Line B (refraction at water surface) and direction from coin to eye.
mark_scheme.accept_zh: B 线（光在水面折射）+ 方向从硬币射向眼睛。
mark_scheme.reject_en: Any other line, or direction from eye to coin.
mark_scheme.reject_zh: 其他线，或方向从眼睛射向硬币。
mark_scheme.ignore_en: Slight wobbles in selected line are not graded.
